lastFailureSignature: hook-capture|hook-no-capture-file|Startup hook did not produce a capture file. Exit code: 0. stdout: Description: A simple app to type int he contents of your clipboard Usage: AutoTyper [options] Options: -?, -h, --help Show help and usage information --version Show version information -d, --delay The amount of time (in seconds) to wait before reading the clipboard and typing [default: 3] -c, --content The content to type rather than using the clipboard -n, --append-new-line Appends a new line (Enter) key at the end of the content -v, --verbose Prints additional information to the console -f, --fast-typing ...
lastFailureMessage:
Startup hook did not produce a capture file. Exit code: 0. stdout: Description:
  A simple app to type int he contents of your clipboard

Usage:
  AutoTyper [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
  --version              Show version information
  -d, --delay            The amount of time (in seconds) to wait before reading the clipboard and typing [default: 3]
  -c, --content          The content to type rather than using the clipboard
  -n, --append-new-line  Appends a new line (Enter) key at the end of the content
  -v, --verbose          Prints additional information to the console
  -f, --fast-typing    ...
